You notice something odd about your skin and find, much to your surprise, that your flesh tone has changed! You now have [pc.skinColor] colored skin.

You touch your face in a moment of idle contemplation, and find that it feels very different than usual. You check your reflection in and see that not only has your skin’s texture changed to something much more in line with what a human’s normally is, it’s also turned an unusual [pc.skinColor] color. You now have [pc.skinColor] human skin!
but now a few strands come away in your hands to reveal that your hair color has changed. You’re now sporting [pc.hairColor] hair!

You double over as a sudden wave of pain passes through your [pc.face]. It feels like the bones are grinding against one another! Finally, the pain becomes dull enough that you can keep moving, but it’s still there.

A groan escapes your lips as you give your [pc.legOrLegs] a rub. They’ve been feeling a bit stiff, and you stretch them out. There is a beep from your codex as it informs you that your recorded height is inaccurate with your actual stature. You’ve shrunk a little over the last hour.

The pain of transformation suddenly rushes through your [pc.legOrLegs]. You have no choice but to find a safe place to huddle down and wait for the process to finish. It is an uncomfortable twenty minutes wait for the process to finish, but thankfully what you’re changing into isn’t hugely outlandish. The joints "+({var0}?"appear unchanged as they ":"")+"reform and reshape themselves into human-like legs and feet.
